description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style design with a metallic bronze and black color scheme. It is equipped with a detachable box magazine located behind the pistol grip, optimizing its overall length for urban maneuverability. The upper receiver sports a full-length Picatinny rail, on which a modern optical sight is mounted, likely a red dot or holographic type. The stock is fixed and robust, with a skeletonized support strut for weight reduction and stability. The barrel is short and standard, with no visible muzzle device attached. The rifle's construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a bronze and black finish, featuring a fixed skeletonized stock, short barrel, and mounted optical sight. Its design is modern and tactical, optimized for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bronze receiver, fixed skeletonized stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, and mounted optical sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the short barrel, sight alignment, and the width of the stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock structure, and the uninterrupted Picatinny rail with mounted sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, sight, and the alignment of the rifle's components.
